context: Tests whether the agent implements the referral tracking middleware with correct cookie settings, first-click attribution (not last-click), click logging, and IP-based rate limiting. Both the middleware and signup attribution logic should be present.

checklist.name: Cookie name is ref_code
checklist.description: The referral cookie is stored under the exact name 'ref_code' (not 'referral', 'ref', or any other name)

checklist.name: 30-day cookie maxAge
checklist.description: Cookie maxAge is set to exactly 30 * 86400 * 1000 milliseconds (or equivalent 2592000000ms), representing a 30-day attribution window

checklist.name: sameSite lax
checklist.description: Cookie has sameSite set to 'lax' (not 'strict' or 'none')

checklist.name: First-click wins
checklist.description: Cookie is only set when no existing ref_code cookie is present — existing ref_code cookies are NOT overwritten

checklist.name: Click logging
checklist.description: Each click event is logged to the database with at minimum: the referral code, the visitor's IP address, and a timestamp

checklist.name: User agent logged
checklist.description: The click log entry includes the user-agent from request headers

checklist.name: IP rate limiting threshold
checklist.description: Clicks from the same IP are rate-limited, blocking or skipping cookie-set/logging after more than 10 clicks from the same IP within 24 hours

checklist.name: Self-referral prevention
checklist.description: The signup attribution code checks that the referral code's owner is not the same as the newly created customer before creating the referral record
